title: Classic Mechanics Auto-Preset-Enabler
description: Auto enables a preset when paired with Classic Mechanics!
body:
![Classic Mechanics Auto-Preset-Enabler!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2b4846ec4b8ce0712f79bd51b1aec9db26dff3d.png)

The Classic Mechanics Auto-Preset-Enabler is a datapack & mod that is supposed to be used together with [Classic Mechanics](https://modrinth.com/datapack/classic-mechanics) - upon loading a world/server with it installed, it will automatically enable a preset for you!

Note that you need at least Classic Mechanics v1.20.4 (for 1.21.4) or higher versions for this to work!

#

### What is Classic Mechanics?
Classic Mechanics is a project made by me; its purpose is to bring back older features, tweaks, bugs, mechanics, & etc, from previous versions of the game into modern minecraft!

You can find it [here](https://modrinth.com/datapack/classic-mechanics)!

You can also find a translated version of it [here]((https://modrinth.com/datapack/mecanicas-classicas)) for portuguese speakers!

#

### NOTE!

This project comes in multiple "versions/editions" - each of them is supposed to be used for a different preset!

| Preset         | Download links |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|
| Alpha | [Mod](https://modrinth.com/datapack/classic-mechanics-auto-preset-enabler/version/1.0.1-(Alpha)+mod) - [Datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/classic-mechanics-auto-preset-enabler/version/1.0.1-(Alpha))              |
| Beta | [Mod](https://modrinth.com/datapack/classic-mechanics-auto-preset-enabler/version/1.0.1-(Beta)+mod) - [Datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/classic-mechanics-auto-preset-enabler/version/1.0.1-(Beta))              |
| Early-release | [Mod](https://modrinth.com/datapack/classic-mechanics-auto-preset-enabler/version/1.0.1-(Early_Release)+mod) - [Datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/classic-mechanics-auto-preset-enabler/version/1.0.1-(Early_Release))              |
| Early-mid-release | [Mod](https://modrinth.com/datapack/classic-mechanics-auto-preset-enabler/version/1.0.1-(Early_Mid_Release)+mod) - [Datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/classic-mechanics-auto-preset-enabler/version/1.0.1-(Early_Mid_Release))              |
| Mid-release | [Mod](https://modrinth.com/datapack/classic-mechanics-auto-preset-enabler/version/1.0.1-(Mid_Release)+mod) - [Datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/classic-mechanics-auto-preset-enabler/version/1.0.1-(Mid_Release))              |
